meta.title: B2UB2B — From Idea to Success
meta.description: International consulting, engineering, and digital group. Complete business solutions in Armenia, Georgia, Europe, and CIS.

hero.subtitle: International consulting, engineering & digital group
hero.description: We build transformative business solutions — from launch and engineering to digitalization, marketing, and scale across Armenia, Georgia, Europe, and CIS.

home.aboutText: B2UB2B is a full-cycle partner for companies that want to launch, grow, and scale internationally. We combine business consulting, engineering excellence, HoReCa expertise, and digital innovation under one roof.
home.geoText: We operate across Armenia, Georgia, Germany, Netherlands, France, Italy, UAE, and beyond — with deep local knowledge and international standards.
home.partnersText: We integrate best-in-class platforms for engineering, automation, cloud, CRM, and marketing.
home.ctaText: Tell us about your project — we'll respond within 24 hours.

about.subtitle: International consulting, engineering & digital group
about.missionText: To be the strategic partner that takes businesses from idea to success — providing consulting, engineering, digital products, marketing, and operational support across emerging and established markets.

expertise.text: Cross-disciplinary teams spanning consulting, MEP engineering, HoReCa, and digital product development.

international.text: Operations in Armenia, Georgia, Europe, and CIS with local partner networks and global standards.

fullCycle.title: Full-cycle delivery
fullCycle.text: One partner from business plan to building automation, website launch, and marketing scale.

partnership.title: True partnership
partnership.text: We embed with your team, communicate transparently, and measure success by your growth.

about.teamText: Engineers, architects, UX designers, developers, marketers, and business consultants — united under one brand to deliver premium results.
